_sessionContext.initialMessage:
Create a goal from the issue: .pio/issues/agent-auto-starts-queued-tasks-from-tool-descriptions.md

The issue describes how tool descriptions in src/index.ts contain imperative phrasing like "Run /pio-next-task to start it" which agents misinterpret as instructions for themselves, causing them to attempt failed bash calls. The fix involves rewording tool descriptions to be clearly informational (for the human user) and adding an explicit guideline to SKILL.md.
